$metadata.author: Usman Hussain
$metadata.scope: Exact future file ownership for repo-grounded Composer FFET candidates.
$metadata.title: Phase 6.5 Composer Exact File Ownership Map v2

ownership.new_file_justification: New Composer-specific files are justified by substrate mapping and keep shared existing substrate as read dependencies unless the candidate explicitly owns a mount/config touchpoint.
